surface_verification.justification: BP-2 is a framework/library change: a per-FR fr_impact map on the work_completed event wire-format (record_event + finalize), a tolerant WorkEvent reader, a new compliance reconciliation helper, and the Control-Grade adapter lighting the change-reconciliation dimension. No product web/api/cli/UI/store surface is introduced or changed; the compliance dashboard/RTM are static tracked .md and the WebUI is unaffected. Verified empirically against the real event log: reconciliation measurable=True, 4 behavior-touched FRs, 0 unreconciled, grade holds A 100 (dimension n/a->live). Full suites green: compliance 765, shared 3598, iterate 436, integration 174; pinned-ruff clean; anti-ratchet 0 ratchets / 0 new crossings.

behaviors.behavior: normalize_fr_impact validates+normalizes the per-FR map (lowercase/trim) and raises on malformed structure (non-dict, unknown impact, blank/non-str key, non-str value)
record_event CLI/build_event writes fr_impact, round-trips write->read, rejects invalid value/JSON, and still passes the ADR-059 FR-gate with FR linkage
finalize_iterate F5b path carries+normalizes fr_impact and FAILS CLOSED (FinalizeGateError) on a malformed map, writing nothing
WorkEvent.from_dict parses fr_impact and tolerates legacy/null/garbage (->{}), stripping+lowercasing values
compute_reconciliation: touched-without-re-verify (age-neutral), spec_impact fallback for legacy events, per-FR granularity, doc-only never flagged, malformed ts skipped
build_grade_inputs lights reconciliation: measurable=bool(behavior-touched), counts filtered to declared requirements, agrees with the helper; n/a when no reqs or no behavior touches
guide.md Control-Grade block documents fr_impact + the reconciliation dimension going n/a->live
behaviors.reason: documentation prose accuracy is verified by reading, not an automated assertion (guide.md is bloat-exempt and content-untested)
